headlines.headline: Jorvis Fuels names new head of digital payments division

sentiment.reasoning: The appointment of a new division head is a standard leadership change that typically has a neutral to slightly positive impact depending on the market's perception of the new hire.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
